blocks.content: She turned around. Slow, like she wasn't surprised he was there.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I saw the list this morning.
She was not walking past. The freshman tryout list is nowhere near the senior hall. She checked it on purpose and she knew that I knew and she held the smile anyway.
She turned around. Made eye contact exactly long enough.
Two seconds of something happening that neither of us named. Then the bell.
I kept walking. She probably didn't even see me. That's what I told myself.
I stopped. She turned around and saw me standing there saying nothing. She gave me a small nod and went back to the senior hall.
Jonathan was going to ask me about this at lunch. I already knew what I was going to say.
